creator: schoutm@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 175229
patch

PowerDNS v4.0.x introduced a memory leak in the gpgsql backend.  Specifically each dns query opens a transaction by calling PQexec("BEGIN") but the returned PGresult pointer is never freed with PQclear().

See https://github.com/PowerDNS/pdns/pull/4459

We've been using this patch in production for several days and it does in fact fix the memory leak.  This patch should be in 4.0.2, but in the meantime its probably a good idea to patch the port.
